title: WN-71 Grid Reference — From Memory
description: Szymanski memorized the WN-71 grid reference from the pre-assault map briefing — a habit he developed because he lost his map card in training and was humiliated by his sergeant for it. He can recite the six-figure grid reference accurately. Passed to Reed at the LCA radio, this becomes the fire mission data that the USS McCook needs to engage the bunker directly. Without Szymanski's testimony, the grid reference must be estimated from observation, which introduces error that could bring the naval rounds onto friendly positions.
